page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.13xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 52 dedicated physical cores and 52 vCPUs, utilizing a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The system is equipped with 192.0 GB of RAM, providing approximately 3.69 GB of memory per core, and includes 2879 GB of local SSD storage. Network connectivity is supported by a 16 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Benchmark data indicates average multi-core performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 45585.16 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 11816.0. Single-core performance is relatively weak, as shown by the stress-ng single-core score of 1314.39. However, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression performance is strong, reaching 193.67 GB/sec. Memory bandwidth and database operations, such as Redis SET operations at 40.63 million operations per second, consistently fall within the average tier.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation, substantial local SSD storage, and balanced memory-to-core ratio, this server offers a resource-dense profile suitable for storage-intensive and database workloads. It is well-suited for relational databases, NoSQL systems, multi-threaded data processing, and static web serving. The lack of hyperthreading ensures predictable compute performance per vCPU, though it trades off the higher thread density found in hyperthreaded configurations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.13xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 52 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 2.5 GHz, paired with 192.0 GB of RAM and 2879 GB of local SSD storage. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Benchmark results place its multi-core processing, memory bandwidth, and database operations in the average tier, while single-core performance is relatively weak. Notably, it demonstrates strong multi-threaded decompression capabilities. With a balanced vCPU-to-RAM ratio and significant local storage, this server is designed for database hosting, multi-threaded data processing, and general-purpose workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and fast local disk access.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.13xlarge is an x86_64 server with 52 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 192 GB RAM, and 2879 GB of local SSD storage, designed for database and multi-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.13xlarge features 52 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 192 GB RAM, and 2879 GB local SSD storage for database and general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A dedicated multi-core server featuring substantial local SSD storage and balanced memory for database and data processing workloads.
bullet_points: 52 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY cores with 192 GB RAM
2879 GB of integrated local SSD storage
Suited for databases, NoSQL systems, and static web serving
